REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (376 Appian Way, Union City, Ca 94587)
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lillian E. Ng for and with Pilar Mero, Administrator.
Kevin Birmingham, Broker.
Satinder Kaur Andal, Real Estate Agent.

The court invited overbids, setting the first overbid amount at $1,313,000 with increments of $10,000 thereafter. No overbids were received from the courtroom, court call, or Zoom. The sale was confirmed at $1,250,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,150,000.00 is required.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-25-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng appeared by zoom for Pilar Mero.
Peter Shelton appeared by zoom for Edward Silva (Petitioner).
John Gudino appeared by zoom in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that Damien Gudino is joining in Pilar's petition. Mr. Shelton stated that his Client is happy to have Pilar move forward and drop his petition, and that he may come back with a petition to appoint a Guardian Ad Litem. Mr. Gudino stated that he has no opposition to the granting of Pilar and Damien's petition. Mr. Silva's Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar. Ms. Mero's Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
